purpose: Unified synthetic experiment package for compactor raw telemetry parsing, waveform classification, anomaly handling, and known-label inference demonstrations.
recommended_start: Run python clean_waveform_benchmark/inference_demo.py, then test raw_payload_runs/all_runs.jsonl with your production parser.
known_signal_principles: Startup spikes are modeled but should not be treated as fill indicators.
Full/high-resistance cycles shift peak resistance earlier in the cycle.
Site class and device fingerprint can change amplitude, duration, variance, and model confidence.
Raw-stream quality issues such as double-runs, truncation, dropout, weak signal, and saturation should be handled before model training.
